form.formComment: Resuming after a six-and-a-half months break. Finished off last campaign second of 9 at Palermo October 6 over 1400m, in the wet; a head behind Million Stripes carrying 56kg at $5.90. On debut ninth of 11 at Palermo May 24 over 1600m, 16 len behind Butterfing carrying 55kg at $6.05. Likely to feature.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 34-day let-up. Last start 6th of 10 at Palermo Turf on March 12 over 1400m, 6 len behind Torremolinos carrying 57kg at $10.70. The start before that second last of 8 at Palermo on February 16 over 1200m, 11 len behind Vamos A Brindar carrying 56kg at $11.50. Nice draw and worth thought.
